body:
Per BCP audit and INCIDENT runbook. Pick one Neon database (start with the smallest revenue-impact: ijustus or wordis-bond). Restore PITR snapshot to a staging branch. Run app smoke. Document gaps. 1-hour budget.

After drill:
- Update DEPLOY_ROLLBACK.md with what worked
- File issues for whatever broke
- Schedule next drill 2026-09-01

2. Post a plan comment and wait for CODEOWNER confirmation before creating any files.
3. Open a draft PR with the new workflow file. Uses Factory GitHub App token pattern, not PATs.
